seoTitle: How to Use Google Gemini to Transcribe Audio or Video to Text
metaDescription: Automatically convert audio or video files into text using Google Gemini, useful for meetings, podcasts, webinars, and accessible content.
intro: Turning audio or video content into text manually is tedious, but Google Gemini can automate the process for you. This guide covers setting up Gemini for transcription, uploading your files, and refining the resulting text for meetings, podcasts, or other content.

steps.heading: Set up Google Gemini for transcription
steps.body: Prepare Gemini for the transcription task, getting the tool ready to accept your audio or video file.

steps.heading: Upload your audio or video file
steps.body: Add the file you want converted, whether it's a meeting recording, podcast episode, or webinar, so Gemini can process it.

steps.heading: Convert audio or video to text
steps.body: Run the transcription process, letting Gemini generate the text version of your uploaded content.

steps.heading: Edit and refine the transcribed text
steps.body: Review the output for accuracy and make any needed edits, since a quick pass over AI transcription helps catch small errors.

faq.question: What kinds of files can Google Gemini transcribe?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers both audio and video files, showing how to upload and convert either type to text.

faq.question: Is this useful for business meetings specifically?
faq.answer: Yes, the video highlights documenting meetings and creating accessible content as key benefits of automated transcription.

faq.question: Do I need to edit the transcription after it's generated?
faq.answer: The tutorial includes a dedicated step for editing and refining the transcribed text, suggesting a review pass is part of the normal workflow.

faq.question: Who can benefit from this transcription feature?
faq.answer: Content creators, educators, and business professionals looking to automate transcription tasks for podcasts, webinars, or meetings.
